## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between BaseTen and GrowthX to discuss potential content marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [BaseTen faces challenges with SEO and content creation for their AI inference platform](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered, expert-led content creation services with proven results](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint proposed at $20k, followed by potential ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in continuing discussions and involving BaseTen's CMO](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)

## Topics

### BaseTen's Current Situation

  - [Marylise joined BaseTen 3.5 months ago as head of product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Recently rebranded and launched on May 19th, just 10 days after Marylise started](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Facing challenges with SEO and visibility for "inference" related searches](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Working with Jordan Digital to improve SEO and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Small marketing team (3 people) struggling to produce enough high-quality, technical content](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Offerings

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, former CMO at Scale.ai and marketing leader at other tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-value, expert-led content that audiences would "pay for if not free"](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Use AI-powered workflows and human experts to scale content creation while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Platform includes research agents, content drafting, and LLM tracking capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Aim to replace need for separate SEO agencies, freelancers, and multiple tools](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### Case Study: Augment Code

  - [In 10-12 weeks, GrowthX created content generating more traffic than Augment's long-standing blog](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Improved visibility in AI-generated answers and search results](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Published over 60 pieces of content in 10 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### Proposed Engagement

  - [8-week strategy sprint for $20,000](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [Includes strategy development, artifact creation, and 3-6 month content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [Begins execution and publishing by week 4-5](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Potential ongoing growth execution at $12,000-$15,000 per month](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
      - [Aims for daily publishing and content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
      - [Includes all content creation, design, and publishing services](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)

### AI's Impact on Content Marketing

  - [First impressions often happening in AI-generated answers](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Content half-life decreasing, requiring more frequent updates](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [High-intent traffic from AI answers may be more valuable than traditional search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marylise to discuss the proposal with Mike (BaseTen's CMO/VP of Marketing)](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Set up a follow-up call with Mike and potentially other team members](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [GrowthX to add BaseTen team to a shared Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Consider timing, as GrowthX is typically 4-6 weeks out for new engagements](https://fathom.video/share/vNP1DPF_4QR8vj94Cn_syBok5LYXRByK?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
